evidence: Refreshed on 2026-04-15 using builds/protobuf-asan-arm64. LLDB resolved breakpoints at wire_format.h:161, coded_stream.cc:1013, and coded_stream.h:694, but both launch attempts failed because macOS debugserver is unavailable. GDB fallback also failed before any stop with DW_FORM_GNU_str_index/DW_FORM_strx debug-info parsing errors. The required state-capture fallback proved the incorrect runtime state before the crash: payload_size=2147483903, computed_size=2147483909, stream_int_size=-2147483387 after static_cast<int>, computed_minus_stream_int=4294967296, write_raw_signed_size=-2147483393, and predicted_end_minus_ptr_before_memcpy=-2147483393. With TRIGGER_SERIALIZE=1, SerializeUnknownFieldsToArray then produced an ASan stack-buffer-overflow writing 2147483903 bytes through EpsCopyOutputStream::WriteStringOutline and overrunning the stack-local stream object at wire_format.h:161.
